commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is needed; maintainer review should decide whether the canonical-provider dedupe and all escape hatch are the intended upgrade behavior.; Cleared: The diff only changes model/provider browse logic and focused tests; it does not change dependencies, CI, secrets handling, package resolution, or code execution surfaces. (sha=1dd208a44baaef5d66c8bbef6e816461ceba7799)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds CLI runtime alias migration/pruning for `/models`, hides implicit CLI alias duplicates when canonical providers already own the same model, preserves explicit legacy/all browse paths, and adds focused model command tests.

PR surface: Source +200, Tests +68. Total +268 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main's focused tests still expect CLI alias provider rows beside canonical providers, and the linked issue gives a concrete Telegram reproduction; I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainer review should decide whether the canonical-provider dedupe and `all` escape hatch are the intended upgrade behavior.

target.title: fix(models): dedupe implicit CLI runtime aliases
target.body:
Summary
- Prune implicit CLI runtime alias provider rows from `/models` provider data when the canonical provider already owns the same model.
- Preserve explicit legacy CLI runtime refs, including configured exact refs and wildcard/provider-visible cases, so existing user configs do not disappear.
- Preserve explicit full-catalog CLI runtime provider browsing: `/models claude-cli all` still lists `claude-cli/*` rows even when canonical `anthropic/*` rows exist.
- Add regression coverage for duplicate alias pruning, explicit legacy preservation, canonical models routed through CLI runtime policy, and the explicit CLI provider `all` browse path.

Verification
- Rebuilt the PR branch cleanly on top of upstream `main`, force-pushed only the fork branch with `--force-with-lease`, then used GitHub update-branch to include the newest `main` again.
- Current PR diff is the intended three files only: `src/agents/model-runtime-aliases.ts`, `src/auto-reply/reply/commands-models.ts`, and `src/auto-reply/reply/commands-models.test.ts`.
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.auto-reply-reply.config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-models.test.ts` passed after the newest branch update: 1 file, 33 tests.
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/auto-reply/reply/commands-models.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-models.test.ts src/agents/model-runtime-aliases.ts` passed after the newest branch update.
- `git diff --check` passed before the clean commit; `git diff --check HEAD^..HEAD` passed after the newest branch update.

Live behavior proof
- Exact build/SHA tested: `1dd208a44baaef5d66c8bbef6e816461ceba7799`.
- Real environment used: local terminal source checkout on macOS Darwin 25.3.0 arm64, Node `v25.6.1`, pnpm `11.2.2`.
- Live path exercised: terminal invocation of the actual `/models` command handler with synthetic terminal sender metadata and isolated workspace `/tmp/openclaw-proof-85982`. No unit-test mocks were used for the proof commands.
- Command flow 1 exercised: `/models`.
- Observed result after patch: default provider browse no longer lists implicit CLI alias providers beside canonical providers:

```text
COMMAND /models
Providers:
- anthropic (4)
- arcee (3)
- google (6)
- openai (16)
- openrouter (3)
- xai (9)

Use: /models <provider>
Switch: /model <provider/model>
END COMMAND /models
```

- Command flow 2 exercised: `/models claude-cli all`.
- Observed result after patch: explicit CLI runtime provider full-catalog browse still works and lists `claude-cli/*` rows:

```text
COMMAND /models claude-cli all
Models (claude-cli · 🔑 token (anthropic:manual)) — showing 1-4 of 4 (page 1/1)
- claude-cli/claude-opus-4-6
- claude-cli/claude-opus-4-7
- claude-cli/claude-opus-4-8
- claude-cli/claude-sonnet-4-6

Switch: /model <provider/model>
END COMMAND /models claude-cli all
```

Before/after symptom evidence
- Before this update, ClawSweeper identified that pruning ran even for `view: "all"`, so explicit CLI provider browse could lose its CLI rows.
- After this update, pruning is skipped for `options.view === "all"`; the terminal proof above shows `/models` dedupes implicit providers while `/models claude-cli all` still works.

Remaining proof gaps
- I did not run the full repository test suite.
- I did not capture a live Telegram Desktop recording; the proof is terminal output from the affected `/models` command path.

Fixes #83342
target.author: kiranmagic7

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
